headline: Uber, Lyft use AI to charge riders more, CR says
summary: If you have been on Instagram or TikTok recently, you've probably seen influencers telling you to purchase your plane tickets at the library or use a VPN to mask your location because of dynamic pricing that changes based on location and search frequency. Dynamic pricing, also known by monikers ...

headline: General Atlantic in Talks to Lead Funding for China’s Kling AI
